name: apsal-studio
description: Build live-action AI photography through five creator-friendly layers that expose every APSAL protocol element, with reusable DNA, bound references, QA, and native-4K runs.

interface.shortDescription: 用五层决策确认十三元素，生成九张真人摄影作品
interface.longDescription: APSAL Studio turns one natural-language idea into five text-card layers covering Content, Emotion, Subject, World, Look, Event, Sequence, Camera, Light, Style, Color/Post, Job and Quality Control; it recommends reusable DNA, binds real references, preserves local lineage and runs nine independent native-4K Jobs.
defaultPrompt: 创建九张真人摄影主题，按五层文字卡确认全部十三个 APSAL 元素。
设计一个欢喜但克制的主题，并分别确认灯光、色调、道具与后期。
把确认的新 DNA 打好标签，保存到我的 DNA 或导出 Extension Pack。
